session.description: Workout session number for a given day. Starts at 1. Use additional sessions only if multiple workouts are performed on the same date.

location.description: Short stable ID for where the workout was performed, such as home or planet_fitness.

superset.description: Optional exercise-level exercise ID for the movement this exercise was alternated with as a superset. For paired supersets, each exercise should reference the other exercise's ID.

readiness.Excellent: Slept well, ate well, hydrated, low stress, minimal soreness, mentally and physically ready for an exceptional workout.
readiness.Good: Normal day. No significant issues expected to affect performance.
readiness.Fair: Some recovery factors are below normal (sleep, nutrition, soreness, stress, hydration, etc.). Performance may be slightly reduced.
readiness.Poor: Significant recovery issues. Performance is expected to suffer.
